name: TWO OF CUPS
subtitle: Dual Sample Player
summary: Two-voice sample player in 6 HP. Each voice plays WAV files from microSD with zero-latency, sample-accurate triggering. 8 banks of up to 32 samples per voice, with CV control over pitch (1 V/oct), gate, and meta sample scan. A single PARAM knob per voice cycles through decay, volume, pitch offset, sample select, loop, and reverse settings.
